creator: ijliao@Terry.Dorm10.NCTU.edu.tw
text:
I've installed ports/apache13 (apache 1.3.4), and then :

Terry [/root] -root- /usr/local/sbin/apachectl start
Syntax error on line 202 of /usr/local/etc/apache/httpd.conf:
Cannot load /usr/local/libexec/apache/mod_mime_magic.so into server: /usr/local/
libexec/apache/mod_mime_magic.so: Undefined symbol "ap_make_sub_pool"
/usr/local/sbin/apachectl start: httpd could not be started

I've used default httpd.conf

ps. I can run apache 1.3.3 from previous port

How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/www/apache13
make install
/usr/local/sbin/apachectl start
